micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.
Use value entries in conditions and function entries in actions.

rows.command_eng: Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.
Add 5 minutes to the oven.
Start the rice cooker on cooking mode for 30 minutes.
Set the siren to emergency mode.
Set the speaker volume to 30.
Turn the TV channel down by one.
Switch the TV to channel 7.
Announce the temperature through the speaker.
Tell me the outdoor temperature through the speaker.
Tell me the current humidity through the speaker.
Switch the dishwasher to dry mode.
